summary: BA's analysis is well-grounded with live git ls-files verification across all 12 repos. Four minor discrepancies found (learning-materials count off by 9, gitignore line reference off by 10, null/index.html is not a direct content-duplicate of root index.html but is still a bug artifact, and budget-management has 60 additional data/processed/ chart PNGs that are covered by the *.png pattern but not explicitly called out). None of these are blocking. The key constraints from the orchestrator's QA prompt are all correctly captured. The spec is actionable and safe to execute.

objections.finding: BA states '64 learning-materials/ files tracked' but live git ls-files /root/knowledge-system ls-files learning-materials/ returns 73 files. The count is off by 9. This may reflect files added between BA's investigation and this QA run, or a counting error. The pattern of the action (git rm -r --cached learning-materials/) is correct regardless of count; the discrepancy does not affect the action.
objections.evidence: git -C /root/knowledge-system ls-files learning-materials/ | wc -l returns 73, not 64 as stated in Measured state

objections.finding: BA spec Repo 2 references '(inferred from .gitignore line 97)' for the workflow-current.json pattern, but the actual line in /root/knowledge-system/.gitignore is line 107. The content is correct; only the line reference is wrong.

BA states null/ files are 'duplicates confirmed in data/cover_letters/ and data/resumes/' (Q4 context). The PDF files are confirmed duplicates (Yuge_Tang_cover_letter_hunterbond-kdb-developer_20260405.pdf and resume counterpart both appear in data/). However, null/index.html (88 lines, title 'Applications | null') has a different MD5 (52b991f86a9567c0db7eddf0bb811733) from root /root/application-assistant/index.html (59daf94a3cc7b12a4b4759394df8f60a). null/index.html is not a content-duplicate of the canonical index.html. It is still a bug artifact (generated with null company name) and safe to delete, but the 'duplicates confirmed' claim is partially inaccurate for the HTML file. The PDFs are genuine duplicates; the index.html is a bug artifact but not a content-duplicate.
objections.evidence: md5sum /root/application-assistant/index.html /root/application-assistant/null/index.html shows different hashes. null/index.html head shows '<title>Applications | null</title>'

objections.finding: BA states '135 PNG + 1 JPG files at root' and proposes '*.png', '*.jpg' patterns in .gitignore plus 'git rm --cached for all tracked PNGs/JPGs'. However, there are 60 additional PNG files tracked under data/processed/*/converted_charts/ (e.g., category_distribution.png, monthly_trend.png, top_merchants.png) that are generated financial analysis charts. The *.png gitignore pattern (which matches in all directories, not just root) will silently untrack all 60 of these data/processed/ chart files in addition to the 136 root-level screenshots. BA's Measured state says '135 PNG + 1 JPG files at root (381 total image/cache/playwright files tracked)' but does not call out the data/processed/ charts specifically or explain whether they are intentional outputs analogous to multi-asset-portfolio charts/ (which BA explicitly protects). The action will proceed correctly for the obvious screenshot files, but the 60 data/processed/ chart PNGs are covered by the action without explicit acknowledgment. These appear regenerable (they come from bank statement processing scripts in /root/budget-management/scripts/), so the action is probably safe, but BA should have explicitly noted this as a known side-effect.
objections.evidence: git -C /root/budget-management ls-files | grep -E '\.png$' | grep '^data/' | wc -l returns 60. Files include data/processed/ReleveCarte_*/converted_charts/*.png

evidence_quality.detail: BA claims tier_2_verified based on live git ls-files and .gitignore reads in this session. Spot-checked all 12 repos via live git ls-files and ls commands. Core claims verified: .last-cleanup/.todos.json/playwright-storage-state.json tracked in dot-claude (383 docs/ confirmed); 525 node_modules + 41 chats + 173 knowledge-base + 5 staged files in knowledge-system (learning-materials off by 9); 2 UUID workflows in knowledge-system-qijie; 11 workflows + .codex + playwright PNG + 8 qa-*.png in multi-asset-portfolio; .codex tracked in orchestra; 135 PNG + 1 JPG + 179 data/cache/ + 6 playwright items in budget-management; .env + 5 UUID workflows + 32 .bak + 71 PNG/JPG + 6 playwright PNGs in travel-planner; bun.lock + package-lock.json + playwright log + debug PNG in happy; untracked-but-not-gitignored items in rednote-mcp; settings.local.json untracked in excel-analyzer; .review/schedule.json + chats/index.json tracked in knowledge-system-jade; null/ + root data files tracked in application-assistant. Minor count discrepancy in learning-materials (9 files). Line number reference in knowledge-system spec is off by 10.

scope_alignment.detail: The per-repo action lists match the user requirement ('fix all problems, delete screenshots and temp files, ignore files that don't need backup/public'). Key constraints from the orchestrator QA prompt are all correctly captured: rednote-mcp dist/ explicitly protected ('Do NOT add dist/ to .gitignore'), multi-asset-portfolio charts/ PNGs not deleted (non-goals section), knowledge-system staged file reset HEAD before git rm --cached is documented (Edge Cases and Technical Hints), application-assistant null/ deletion confirmed safe (Q4 resolution). Minor scope gap: 60 budget-management data/processed/ chart PNGs will be untracked by the *.png gitignore pattern without explicit acknowledgment in the spec.

investigation_completeness.detail: BA ran live git ls-files in all 12 repos and read .gitignore files. All 4 ambiguities were resolved via user Q&A (Q1-Q4). The staged file warning in knowledge-system is correctly identified. The .codex file vs .codex/ directory gitignore pattern mismatch is identified with correct remediation. The knowledge-system !.claude/ force-track exception interaction with the proposed .claude/workflow-*.json pattern was not explicitly analyzed in the spec but the pattern is correct: .claude/workflow-current.json already works at line 107 after !.claude/ at line 80 (we verified git check-ignore confirms this), so .claude/workflow-*.json will work identically. BA correctly captured that only .claude/workflow-current.json is in .gitignore (the UUID files are not ignored), confirmed by git check-ignore test showing UUID file NOT IGNORED.

affected_file_accuracy.detail: All repo paths verified to exist. Tracked files confirmed via live git ls-files. Proposed gitignore patterns are appropriate: .claude/workflow-*.json covers UUID variants, *.bak global pattern correctly broader than data/*/*.bak, .codex bare entry covers file (not directory), .playwright-mcp/ covers directory. rednote-mcp dist/ intentionally tracked confirmed (package.json shows 'files: [dist, README.md, LICENSE]' and 18 files in dist/ are tracked). knowledge-system-jade .review/ and chats/ patterns already exist in .gitignore (confirmed), files were committed before rules added. application-assistant duplicate PDFs confirmed in data/resumes/ and data/cover_letters/. Root extension-less files (education_details etc.) confirmed with exact duplicate in data/experience_details (same MD5).

spec_text_vs_execution_drift.detail: The proposed operations (gitignore additions + git rm --cached + file deletions) are the correct git operations for the goal. git rm --cached (not git rm) correctly untracked without disk deletion where specified. Physical deletion commands correctly use rm -rf for null/ (nested directory) vs rm for individual files. The AC verification commands (git check-ignore, git ls-files) are the correct tools for post-execution verification. AC2's grep pattern correctly targets transient file classes. The knowledge-system reset HEAD instruction is correctly placed before git rm --cached in both the spec Edge Cases section and the Technical Hints section, satisfying the orchestrator's constraint.

rednote_mcp_dist_not_gitignored.evidence: BA spec Repo 9 Non-goals: 'Do NOT add dist/ to .gitignore (intentional build output per architect)'. Confirmed: dist/ is intentionally tracked (package.json files field includes dist/; 18 dist/ files tracked).

multi_asset_portfolio_charts_pngs_not_de.evidence: BA spec Repo 4 Non-goals: 'Do NOT add dist/ or charts/ to .gitignore (intentional per architect)'. charts/ directory exists at /root/multi-asset-portfolio/charts/ and is not in the action list for deletion.

knowledge_system_reset_head_before_git_r.evidence: BA spec Technical Hints last line: 'knowledge-system: reset the staging area first (git reset HEAD) before fixing .gitignore, then re-stage only what belongs'. Context JSON repos[knowledge-system].notes: 'IMPORTANT: run git reset HEAD first to unstage all accidentally staged private data, THEN fix .gitignore, THEN run git rm --cached'. Edge Cases section also documents the staged file risk.

application_assistant_null_deletion_safe.evidence: PDFs in null/hunterbond-kdb-developer/ confirmed duplicated in data/resumes/ and data/cover_letters/. Root extension-less files confirmed duplicated in data/ (same MD5 for experience_details). Q4 resolution confirms user approved deletion. Note: null/index.html is a bug artifact (title='Applications | null') but not a content-duplicate of canonical index.html - it is still safe to delete as it is an output artifact from a null company name bug.

verified_facts: dot-claude: .last-cleanup, .todos.json, playwright-storage-state.json tracked; 383 docs/ files tracked - all confirmed
knowledge-system: 525 node_modules, 41 chats, 173 knowledge-base, 5 staged files confirmed; learning-materials actual count 73 (BA says 64)
knowledge-system-qijie: exactly 2 UUID workflow files tracked, confirmed by git ls-files
multi-asset-portfolio: 11 workflow UUID files tracked, .codex file tracked, 1 .playwright-mcp PNG tracked, 8 qa-*.png on disk
orchestra: .codex is empty file tracked; .codex/ pattern in .gitignore covers only a directory, not the file
budget-management: 135 PNG + 1 JPG at root confirmed; 179 data/cache/ files; 6 playwright items (5 logs + 1 CSV); 3 data/decisions/ files tracked and must stay
budget-management: additional 60 PNG files in data/processed/ chart directories will be untracked by *.png pattern
travel-planner: .env tracked, 32 .bak tracked, 71 PNG/JPG tracked, 6 playwright PNGs tracked, 5 UUID workflow files tracked
happy: bun.lock + package-lock.json tracked; yarn.lock exists at /root/happy/yarn.lock (549KB); project uses yarn@1.22.22
rednote-mcp: .codex/.claude/stderr_preinstall_*.txt/INDEX.md all untracked but not gitignored; dist/ intentionally tracked (18 files, package.json files field)
excel-analyzer: .claude/settings.local.json exists on disk, not tracked, gitignore missing the pattern
knowledge-system-jade: .review/schedule.json and chats/index.json tracked despite patterns in .gitignore
application-assistant: null/ (3 files), education_details, experience_details, projects, skills all tracked and confirmed
